description: Same-timestep dropped-connection label recovery from full current QoS/QoE variables. This is an upper-bound internal-consistency task, not a deployment prediction task.
exclude_columns: User_ID; Session_ID; Timestamp; Synthetic_Latitude; Synthetic_Longitude; Tower_ID; Dropped_Connection; Drop_t_plus_1; Video_Quality_Label; Anomalous; Offered_Downlink_Mbps; Offered_Upload_Mbps; Propagation_Model; Propagation_Scenario; LOS_State; LOS_Probability; Carrier_Frequency_GHz; Distance_2D_m; Distance_3D_m; Breakpoint_Distance_m; Path_Loss_dB; Deterministic_Path_Loss_dB; Shadow_Fading_dB; Fast_Fading_dB; Obstruction_Penalty_dB; Weather_Penalty_dB; Mobility_Penalty_dB; Indoor_Penalty_dB; Contextual_Penalty_dB; Effective_TX_Power_dBm; Signal_Strength_Unclipped_dBm; RSRP_Clipped

description: One-step-ahead dropped-connection prediction using current-row QoS/QoE variables, while excluding the current and future drop labels.
exclude_columns: User_ID; Session_ID; Timestamp; Synthetic_Latitude; Synthetic_Longitude; Tower_ID; Dropped_Connection; Drop_t_plus_1; Video_Quality_Label; Anomalous; Offered_Downlink_Mbps; Offered_Upload_Mbps; Propagation_Model; Propagation_Scenario; LOS_State; LOS_Probability; Carrier_Frequency_GHz; Distance_2D_m; Distance_3D_m; Breakpoint_Distance_m; Path_Loss_dB; Deterministic_Path_Loss_dB; Shadow_Fading_dB; Fast_Fading_dB; Obstruction_Penalty_dB; Weather_Penalty_dB; Mobility_Penalty_dB; Indoor_Penalty_dB; Contextual_Penalty_dB; Effective_TX_Power_dBm; Signal_Strength_Unclipped_dBm; RSRP_Clipped

description: Leakage-controlled one-step-ahead dropped-connection prediction using only session, scenario, device, application, and temporal context variables available before QoS outcomes.
include_columns: Hour; Day_of_Week; Is_Weekend; Deployment_Area; Area_Type; Network_Type; UE_Profile; UE_Capability_Class; Operator_Profile; Weather; Movement_Speed; App_Type; Is_Indoor; Activity_Factor; Connected_Duration_min
